question: What are flight numbers of flights departing from City "Aberdeen "?
gold_sql: SELECT T1.FlightNo FROM FLIGHTS AS T1 JOIN AIRPORTS AS T2 ON T1.SourceAirport   =  T2.AirportCode WHERE T2.City  =  "Aberdeen"
predicted_sql: SELECT T1.attr_6d8380 FROM flights AS T1 JOIN airports AS T2 ON T1.attr_bb3b2d = T2.attr_bee03b WHERE T2.municipality = 'Aberdeen ';
raw_response: SELECT T1.attr_6d8380 FROM flights AS T1 JOIN airports AS T2 ON T1.attr_bb3b2d = T2.attr_bee03b WHERE T2.municipality = 'Aberdeen ';
